title: houstonia micrantha
intro: Houstonia micrantha, also known as the smallflower bluet or small blue, is a small perennial flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Houstonia micrantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in herbal remedies.
